# Epi 202: Probability

{{< include _subfiles/probability/_eq_var_lincom.qmd >}}

$$\Expf{Y} = \Expf{\Expf{Y \mid X}}$$

$$\Expf{Y \mid Z} = \Expf{\Expf{Y \mid X,Z} | Z}$$

$$\Var{Y} = \Expf{\Var{Y \mid X}} + \Var{\Expf{Y \mid X}}$$

$$\Cov{Y,Z} = \Expf{\Cov{Y,Z \mid X}} + \Cov{\Expf{Y \mid X}, \Expf{Z \mid X}}$$
